Home / About Us
Who We Are

Engineering Excellence
Since 2021

GN Management Services is a professional infrastructure company delivering integrated telecom and civil solutions across India. We are committed to quality, safety, and timely delivery in every project.

Our Story

From Faridabad to PAN India

GN Management Services was established in 2021, located at Faridabad, Haryana. The company was founded with a clear mission: deliver quality infrastructure work and complete customer satisfaction across India's rapidly evolving telecom and civil sectors.

Starting primarily with Optical Fiber Cable (OFC) execution and Tower Upgradation Works, the company has grown from strength to strength to become one of India's leading integrated infrastructure providers. We now serve diverse sectors — from telecom operators to government bodies, from corporate offices to highway authorities.

Our expertise spans the complete project lifecycle: from planning, RF surveys, LOS and civil surveys, installation and commissioning of BTS/MW, drive testing, and optimization — to civil construction, industrial shed building, solar installation, office fitouts, and highway safety works.

Get In Touch Our Services
2021 – Founded

Incorporated in Faridabad, Haryana. Started with OFC execution and tower upgradation works for BRO and leading operators.

2022 – Expansion

Expanded into civil infrastructure, industrial shed construction, and opened Branch Office in Jammu, J&K.

2023 – BSNL Partnership

Secured partnership for BSNL 4G Network Expansion. Began solar power installation at BSNL BTS sites and highway safety works.

2024 – Multi-Vertical Growth

Added Office Interior Solutions and Design Engineering. Collaborated with Praptham, Pace Digitek, and Melco India. Team grew to 100+.

Today – PAN India Leader

50,000+ km OFC executed, 100+ team members, 8 business verticals, serving government and corporate clients across India.

Our Foundation

Mission, Vision & Values

🎯

Our Mission

To deliver quality infrastructure solutions with complete customer satisfaction — on time, within budget, and to the highest safety standards. We aim to be the most trusted integrated infrastructure partner across India.

🔭

Our Vision

To become India's most recognized and respected integrated infrastructure company — providing innovative, sustainable, and cost-effective solutions that build the nation's connectivity and physical infrastructure.

💎

Our Values

→ Quality First in Everything
→ Safety Without Compromise
→ Timely & Reliable Delivery
→ Innovation & Sustainability
→ Cost Effectiveness
→ Customer Partnership
Technical Expertise

Our Technical Team

GN Management Services takes pride in its dedicated Technical Team specializing in civil works and infrastructure projects. Our team consists of approximately 100+ skilled professionals, including engineers, supervisors, technicians, and support staff, all working collaboratively to ensure high-quality project execution.

🏗️
Civil Works Expertise
Extensive experience in construction, structural work, building projects & infrastructure development
👷
Skilled Workforce
Trained engineers, technicians & labourers equipped with latest tools and techniques
⚡
Project Efficiency
Delivering projects on time without compromising quality or safety standards
🔬
Innovation & Safety
Modern construction methods, quality control & strict adherence to safety standards
One Step Ahead
Engineers & Project Managers 40+
Field Technicians & Supervisors 60+
Total Skilled Professionals 100+
States of Operation 10+
OFC Executed PAN India 50K km
Special Advantage

We use Red Oxide in foundation angel/cable tray for strength. Powder coated angels support the poles. Good quality unbreakable nut bolts. M.S. Caps are used to close the top of the poles.

Leadership

What Makes Us Different

Our Specialization

🌱
Sustainable Projects
Sustainable revenue CAGR with green, environmentally-friendly approaches to infrastructure
🌍
International Quality Standards
Applied latest international standards where local standards are not available or applicable
⏱️
Timely Delivery
On-time project completion without compromising quality or safety — every time
💰
Cost Effectiveness
Maximum value delivery within client budgets without compromising project quality
♻️
Green Products
Environmentally friendly materials, green construction methods, solar-first approach
🔬
Continuous Innovation
New design research, dual pole mounts, ABB/Schneider MCBs, Hilti fasteners for best performance
